mapper.select: SELECT D.HOST_NAME, D.TARGET_ID, D.PATH_CNT, D.TOTAL, D.DATA_TYPES FROM ( SELECT T.NAME AS HOST_NAME, RI.TARGET_ID, SUM(RI.MATCH_LOCATIONS) AS PATH_CNT, SUM(RI.MATCH) AS TOTAL, GROUP_CONCAT(RI.DATA_TYPES SEPARATOR '|||') AS DATA_TYPES FROM ( SELECT RI.TARGET_ID, RI.AP_NO, RI.MATCH_LOCATIONS, RI.MATCH, RI.DATA_TYPES, ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY RI.TARGET_ID, RI.AP_NO ORDER BY RI.TIMESTAMP DESC) AS rn FROM pi_rawisolated RI ) RI LEFT OUTER JOIN pi_targets T ON T.TARGET_ID = RI.TARGET_ID AND T.AP_NO = RI.AP_NO WHERE RI.rn = 1 GROUP BY RI.TARGET_ID ORDER BY PATH_CNT DESC LIMIT 5 ) D

SELECT SUM(PATH_CNT) AS PATH_CNT, SUM(SUCCEED) AS SUCCEED, GROUP_CONCAT(DATA_TYPES SEPARATOR '|||') AS DATA_TYPES, SUM(TOTAL) AS TOTAL, REGDATE AS MONTH, COUNT(*) AS SEARCH FROM (SELECT RI.DATA_TYPES, DATE_FORMAT(FROM_UNIXTIME(RI.TIMESTAMP), '%Y년 %m월') AS REGDATE, RI.MATCH_LOCATIONS AS PATH_CNT, RI.MATCH AS TOTAL, IF(RI.MATCH != 0, 1, 0) AS SUCCEED FROM ( SELECT RI.TARGET_ID, RI.AP_NO, RI.DATA_TYPES, RI.TIMESTAMP, RI.MATCH_LOCATIONS, RI.MATCH, RI.REPORT_TIMESTAMP, ROW_NUMBER() OVER ( PARTITION BY RI.TARGET_ID, RI.AP_NO, DATE_FORMAT(FROM_UNIXTIME(RI.TIMESTAMP), '%Y-%m') ORDER BY RI.TIMESTAMP DESC ) AS rn FROM pi_rawisolated RI WHERE FROM_UNIXTIME(RI.TIMESTAMP) BETWEEN CONCAT(#{fromDate},' 00:00:00') AND CONCAT(#{toDate},' 23:59:59') ) RI LEFT OUTER JOIN ( SELECT TARGET_ID, AP_NO, REPORT_ID FROM pi_isolated I1 WHERE I1.REGDATE BETWEEN CONCAT(#{fromDate},' 00:00:00') AND CONCAT(#{toDate},' 23:59:59') ) I ON I.TARGET_ID = RI.TARGET_ID AND I.AP_NO = RI.AP_NO WHERE RI.rn = 1 AND I.REPORT_ID = RI.REPORT_TIMESTAMP ) S GROUP BY S.REGDATE ORDER BY S.REGDATE DESC LIMIT 12

SELECT SUM(PATH_CNT) AS PATH_CNT, SUM(SUCCEED) AS SUCCEED, GROUP_CONCAT(DATA_TYPES SEPARATOR '|||') AS DATA_TYPES, SUM(TOTAL) AS TOTAL, REGDATE AS MONTH, COUNT(*) AS SEARCH FROM (SELECT RI.DATA_TYPES, DATE_FORMAT(FROM_UNIXTIME(RI.TIMESTAMP), '%Y년 %m월') AS REGDATE, RI.MATCH_LOCATIONS AS PATH_CNT, RI.MATCH AS TOTAL, IF(RI.MATCH != 0, 1, 0) AS SUCCEED FROM ( SELECT RI.TARGET_ID, RI.AP_NO, RI.DATA_TYPES, RI.TIMESTAMP, RI.MATCH_LOCATIONS, RI.MATCH, RI.REPORT_TIMESTAMP, ROW_NUMBER() OVER ( PARTITION BY RI.TARGET_ID, RI.AP_NO, DATE_FORMAT(FROM_UNIXTIME(RI.TIMESTAMP), '%Y-%m') ORDER BY RI.TIMESTAMP DESC ) AS rn FROM pi_rawisolated RI WHERE FROM_UNIXTIME(RI.TIMESTAMP) BETWEEN CONCAT(#{fromDate},' 00:00:00') AND CONCAT(#{toDate},' 23:59:59') ) RI LEFT OUTER JOIN ( SELECT TARGET_ID, AP_NO, REPORT_ID FROM pi_isolated I1 WHERE I1.REGDATE BETWEEN CONCAT(#{fromDate},' 00:00:00') AND CONCAT(#{toDate},' 23:59:59') ) I ON I.TARGET_ID = RI.TARGET_ID AND I.AP_NO = RI.AP_NO WHERE RI.rn = 1 AND I.REPORT_ID = RI.REPORT_TIMESTAMP ) S GROUP BY S.REGDATE ORDER BY S.REGDATE

WITH MEASUREMENT AS (SELECT T.TARGET_ID, T.NAME, T.AP_NO, SUM(CASE WHEN INSTR(UPPER(S.DATA_TYPE), 'SOUTH KOREAN RRN') > 0 THEN S.MATCH_COUNT ELSE 0 END) AS TYPE1, SUM(CASE WHEN INSTR(UPPER(S.DATA_TYPE), 'SOUTH KOREAN FOREIGNER NUMBER') > 0 THEN S.MATCH_COUNT ELSE 0 END) AS TYPE2, SUM(CASE WHEN INSTR(UPPER(S.DATA_TYPE), 'SOUTH KOREAN PASSPORT') > 0 THEN S.MATCH_COUNT ELSE 0 END) AS TYPE3, SUM(CASE WHEN INSTR(UPPER(S.DATA_TYPE), 'SOUTH KOREAN DRIVER LICENSE NUMBER') > 0 THEN S.MATCH_COUNT ELSE 0 END) AS TYPE4, SUM(CASE WHEN INSTR(UPPER(S.DATA_TYPE), 'ACCOUNT NUMBER') > 0 THEN S.MATCH_COUNT ELSE 0 END) AS TYPE5, SUM(CASE WHEN INSTR(UPPER(S.DATA_TYPE), 'VISA') > 0 THEN S.MATCH_COUNT ELSE 0 END) + SUM(CASE WHEN INSTR(UPPER(S.DATA_TYPE), 'MAESTRO') > 0 THEN S.MATCH_COUNT ELSE 0 END) + SUM(CASE WHEN INSTR(UPPER(S.DATA_TYPE), 'PRIVATE LABEL CARD') > 0 THEN S.MATCH_COUNT ELSE 0 END) + SUM(CASE WHEN INSTR(UPPER(S.DATA_TYPE), 'DINERS CLUB') > 0 THEN S.MATCH_COUNT ELSE 0 END) + SUM(CASE WHEN INSTR(UPPER(S.DATA_TYPE), 'JCB') > 0 THEN S.MATCH_COUNT ELSE 0 END) + SUM(CASE WHEN INSTR(UPPER(S.DATA_TYPE), 'LASER') > 0 THEN S.MATCH_COUNT ELSE 0 END) + SUM(CASE WHEN INSTR(UPPER(S.DATA_TYPE), 'CHINA UNION PAY') > 0 THEN S.MATCH_COUNT ELSE 0 END) + SUM(CASE WHEN INSTR(UPPER(S.DATA_TYPE), 'DISCOVER') > 0 THEN S.MATCH_COUNT ELSE 0 END) + SUM(CASE WHEN INSTR(UPPER(S.DATA_TYPE), 'TROY') > 0 THEN S.MATCH_COUNT ELSE 0 END) + SUM(CASE WHEN INSTR(UPPER(S.DATA_TYPE), 'MASTERCARD') > 0 THEN S.MATCH_COUNT ELSE 0 END) + SUM(CASE WHEN INSTR(UPPER(S.DATA_TYPE), 'AMERICAN EXPRESS') > 0 THEN S.MATCH_COUNT ELSE 0 END) AS TYPE6, SUM(CASE WHEN INSTR(UPPER(S.DATA_TYPE), 'EMAIL') > 0 THEN S.MATCH_COUNT ELSE 0 END) AS TYPE7, SUM(CASE WHEN INSTR(UPPER(S.DATA_TYPE), 'SOUTH KOREAN MOBILE PHONE NUMBER') > 0 THEN S.MATCH_COUNT ELSE 0 END) AS TYPE8 FROM pi_ap_server AP, pi_summary S, pi_targets T LEFT OUTER JOIN pi_data_processing DP ON T.TARGET_ID = DP.TARGET_ID AND T.AP_NO = DP.AP_NO WHERE 1=1 AND T.TARGET_ID = S.TARGET_ID AND T.AP_NO = S.AP_NO AND S.AP_NO = AP.AP_NO AND AP.IS_SERVER = 1 AND DP.PROCESSING_FLAG IN (1, 2, 3) AND DP.APPROVAL_STATUS = 'E' AND S.REGDATE BETWEEN CONCAT(#{fromDate},' 00:00:00') AND CONCAT(#{toDate},' 23:59:59') GROUP BY T.TARGET_ID, T.AP_NO)
SELECT TARGET_ID, IFNULL(NAME, '합계') AS NAME, SUM(TYPE1) AS TYPE1, SUM(TYPE2) AS TYPE2, SUM(TYPE3) AS TYPE3, SUM(TYPE4) AS TYPE4, SUM(TYPE5) AS TYPE5, SUM(TYPE6) AS TYPE6, SUM(TYPE7) AS TYPE7, SUM(TYPE8) AS TYPE8 FROM MEASUREMENT GROUP BY NAME WITH ROLLUP

SELECT IFNULL(SUM(RI.MATCH_LOCATIONS), 0) AS PATH_CNT, COUNT(DISTINCT RI.TARGET_ID) AS COUNT_TARGET_ID, GROUP_CONCAT(RI.DATA_TYPES SEPARATOR '|||') AS DATA_TYPES, IFNULL(SUM(RI.MATCH), 0) AS TOTAL FROM ( SELECT RI.TARGET_ID, RI.AP_NO, RI.MATCH_LOCATIONS, RI.MATCH, RI.DATA_TYPES, RI.REPORT_TIMESTAMP, ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY RI.TARGET_ID, RI.AP_NO ORDER BY RI.TIMESTAMP DESC) AS rn FROM pi_rawisolated RI ) RI LEFT OUTER JOIN ( SELECT TARGET_ID, AP_NO, REPORT_ID FROM pi_isolated I1 ) I ON I.TARGET_ID = RI.TARGET_ID AND I.AP_NO = RI.AP_NO WHERE RI.rn = 1 AND I.REPORT_ID = RI.REPORT_TIMESTAMP

SELECT GROUP_CONCAT(DATA_TYPES SEPARATOR '|||') AS DATA_TYPES FROM ( SELECT RI.DATA_TYPES, ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY RI.TARGET_ID, RI.AP_NO ORDER BY RI.TIMESTAMP DESC) AS rn FROM pi_rawisolated RI ) AS RankedData WHERE rn = 1

SELECT T.TARGET_ID, T.AP_NO, T.NAME, DATE_FORMAT(MAX(TC.REGDATE), '%Y년 %m월') AS REGDATE, IFNULL(TC.PATH_CNT, 0) AS FILE, IFNULL(TC.RRN, 0) AS TYPE1, SUM(TC.MOBILE_PHONE + TC.PHONE) AS TYPE2, IFNULL(TC.ACCOUNT_NUM, 0) AS TYPE3, IFNULL(TC.CARD_NUM, 0) AS TYPE4, IFNULL(TC.FOREIGNER, 0) AS TYPE5, IFNULL(TC.DRIVER, 0) AS TYPE6, IFNULL(TC.EMAIL, 0) AS TYPE7, IFNULL(TC.PASSPORT, 0) AS TYPE8, IFNULL(TC.TOTAL, 0) AS TOTALS, IFNULL(TC.RRN + TC.MOBILE_PHONE + TC.PHONE + TC.ACCOUNT_NUM + TC.CARD_NUM + TC.FOREIGNER + TC.DRIVER + TC.EMAIL + TC.PASSPORT, 0) AS COUNT FROM pi_targets T LEFT JOIN pi_topcomp TC ON T.TARGET_ID = TC.TARGET_ID AND T.AP_NO = TC.AP_NO WHERE 1=1 AND TC.REGDATE BETWEEN CONCAT(#{fromDate},' 00:00:00') AND CONCAT(#{toDate},' 23:59:59') GROUP BY T.TARGET_ID, T.AP_NO ORDER BY FILE DESC
